summary: Emilie Schytte left Borgernes Parti citing dissatisfaction with party rhetoric, reducing BP to 2 mandates and adding a third blue-origin løsgænger. No same-window response from BP leadership.

developments.description: Schytte announced departure from BP: 'Jeg kan ikke længere stå inde for den retorik, partiet fører.' Left over leadership style disagreements, not ideology. Did not commit to joining another party.
developments.impact: BP 3→2 mandates; new LG-BP2 løsgænger; BP toxicity deepens

parameterChanges.justification: Third BP instability event; V can't rely on BP
KF further distances from fragmenting BP
BP isolation deepens; LA already expelled own member

newEntities.name: Emilie Schytte (tidl. BP)
newEntities.notes: Left over leadership disagreements, not ideology. Blue-origin.

confidenceAssessment: high — direct quote from Schytte; seat change is factual
